title: Trend-Motor Test Programi -- Stage 0 pre-registration
discipline_note: This document is committed BEFORE any backtest is run and BEFORE any result is seen. The dated commit is the pre-registration proof. Parameters are FROZEN: no post-hoc tuning (RR-039 + Faz 0 data-snooping lesson).

basis.cost_and_regime: RR-038 (BSMV on commission; round-trip >= 0.3-0.5%; modern BIST reversal-dominant, regime-dependent)
basis.architecture: ARCHITECTURE v2.0 sec.3 (Katman A funnel), sec.7.1 (per-trade expectancy gating)
basis.decision_rule: DEC-039 -- this program MEASURES; Katman A motor choice is the project

objective: Measure whether the three trend rule variants carry real edge in BIST 2019-2026 via post-cost per-trade expectancy, beating a random-entry benchmark and a net-of-cost buy-and-hold, consistently across regimes. Precondition: no Katman A construction until edge is proven.

universe.liquidity_floor: median daily TL volume (snapshot._compute_adv) >= 50,000,000 TL over >= 60 days
universe.adv_substitution_note: Directive named is_adv_eligible (smart_money_layer); that requires a USD volume_3m_mn_usd shape the OHLCV snapshot does not carry. _compute_adv (TL median) is the fitting reuse. the maintainer-approved substitution.

survivorship.reality: delisted names are 404 on yfinance (same hard limit as Faz 0); the free channel carries no delisted prices
survivorship.handling: survivors-only snapshot; the gap and its bias DIRECTION are recorded in snapshot meta + reported explicitly
survivorship.bias_framing: Survivors-only INFLATES expectancy -> every result is read as an UPPER BOUND. If a variant cannot beat the random benchmark post-cost on survivors-only data, it definitely cannot in reality. No silent 'full coverage' claim.

common_prefilter.timing: signal at t close; entry at t+1 open (look-ahead guard)
common_prefilter.fundamental_filter: OUT OF SCOPE (liquidity + technical only for this test)

parabolic_avoidance.tested: ON and OFF (RR-039 evidence gap #2; within-variant comparison, not a new rule)
block_new_buy_if_any: distance from last swing low > 5.0 x ATR(14)

A_sr_flip_retest.swing_detection: scipy find_peaks over trailing 252 days; distance=5 bars; prominence >= 1.0 x ATR
A_sr_flip_retest.resistance_zones: sklearn AgglomerativeClustering, merge distance ~ 1.0 x ATR, min 2 touches
A_sr_flip_retest.trigger: close > resistance x (1 + 0.005) AND breakout-bar volume >= 1.2 x avg(20)
A_sr_flip_retest.entry: retest within 10 bars: |price - level| <= 0.5 x ATR and close holds above level

B_consolidation_breakout.consolidation: BBW(20,2sigma) in bottom 25% of trailing 126 days OR NR7 (narrowest range of last 7)
B_consolidation_breakout.box: max high / min low over last 20 bars
B_consolidation_breakout.trigger: close > box upper AND volume >= 1.2 x avg(20)

C_donchian_retest.entry: retest within 10 bars: pullback holds at 20-EMA / old Donchian-upper, |price - level| <= 0.5 x ATR
C_donchian_retest.parabolic_note: parabolic filter is critical here (Donchian early-vs-late tension)

cost_model.rationale: RR-038: BSMV (%5) charged on commission, not turnover; round-trip commission+spread+BSMV plausibly >= 0.3-0.5% (BIST-calibrated). Sensitivity at 0.3/0.5/0.8%.

random_entry.method: match each variant's trade count and holding-duration distribution; draw random (ticker, entry-date); recompute post-cost expectancy; repeat 1000 times -> null distribution

significance.expectancy: per-trade R-multiple mean; one-sample HAC-robust t on time-ordered daily PnL (newey_west_se, lag=5) + block bootstrap CI (N=2000, block=21, seed=12345)

regime_decomposition.market_state: XU100 200-day MA: bull = close>MA & MA rising; bear = close<MA & MA falling; sideways = otherwise

gating_AND: post-cost per-trade expectancy > 0 AND HAC t >= 2.0
observed expectancy > 95th percentile of random-entry null (MOST CRITICAL)
regime-consistent: expectancy > 0 in >= 2 of {bull,bear,sideways} AND no single regime slice contributes > 80% of net PnL
failure_thresholds_any: wins only in a single regime / the 2021-22 bubble

n_lock.rule: N<=3 variants. parabolic on/off and regime slices are within-variant comparisons, NOT new rules. Post-hoc parameter sweeping forbidden.

tools.indicators: hand-rolled pandas (ATR/RSI/SMA/EMA/BBW/Donchian/ADX/NR7/inside-bar) -- no new heavy dependency
tools.backtest: own pandas event-study (keeps look-ahead guard in hand); NO vectorbt / pandas-ta added

outputs: docs/trend_test/trend_test_results.json (after run: variant x filter-on/off x regime x cost-scenario)
docs/research/D-185-trend-test-rapor.md (verdict + upper-bound framing + Katman A recommendation if any)
